patterns.recommended_action: Leadership review this week: Clarify SOP/customer policy, publish examples, and run a calibration huddle.
sample_summaries: RLHF raters disagree on refusal policy for borderline prompts; guidance unclear.
Customer flagged inconsistent RLHF ratings traced to ambiguous policy wording.
Preference ranking blocked because policy guidance for sensitive prompts is ambiguous.

patterns.recommended_action: Leadership review this week: Start quality containment, inspect failed samples, refresh gold tasks, and assign a QA owner.
sample_summaries: Code Review escalation linked to quality defect.
Repeated quality defects found post-delivery in code review samples.
Code review quality defect cluster: reviewers missing security-sensitive bugs.

patterns.recommended_action: Leadership review this week: Confirm customer requirement delta, propagate updated instructions, and audit affected queues.
sample_summaries: Expert Review escalation linked to customer requirement change.
Another customer requirement change hit expert review; instructions not propagated.
Expert review specs changed by customer mid-batch; rubric now out of date.

patterns.recommended_action: Leadership review this week: Run reviewer calibration, inspect disagreement samples, and increase QA sampling until alignment recovers.
sample_summaries: RLHF reviewer agreement dropping; calibration drift between rater cohorts.
RLHF reviewer disagreement recurring on preference ranking; alignment huddle needed.
Misaligned RLHF reviewers producing conflicting labels for identical prompt types.

patterns.recommended_action: Leadership review this week: Rebalance staffing, add backup coverage, and monitor backlog aging until volume normalizes.
sample_summaries: Audio evaluation backlog growing; not enough specialist reviewers on shift.
Audio eval staffing gap repeating during weekend coverage; queue aging past 72 hours.
Specialist shortage for audio evaluation; aged backlog climbing week over week.
